case_title: WEST, CAROL VS AMERICAN TRANS AIR,INC.%AGT.FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,625.00 FILED BY WEST, CAROL AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN TRANS AIR,INC.%AGT.FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS THE PRENTICE-HALL CORPORATION SYSTEM, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO PRENTICE HALL CORP. SYSTEM AUTH AGENT FOR AMERICAN TRANS AIR RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN TRANS AIR,INC.%AGT.FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS THE PRENTICE-HALL CORPORATION SYSTEM, INC. COURT RECEIVED PHONE CALL FROM PLAINTIFF STATING THAT THE CASE SETTLED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN TRANS AIR,INC.%AGT.FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS THE PRENTICE-HALL CORPORATION SYSTEM, INC.
